name: Candy Cannibal || Strawberry/Cotton Candy soldier POV
description:
"This isn't war! This.. This is hunt!"

Candy Cannibal is a bot based off Delmu work and original characters. (if u are wondering what the translation of the white text in the pfp is, it's the quote above). EVERY SINGLE ARTWORK USED IN IT IS MADE BY DELMU. I don't own any of these images nor the characters except White Pepper, Tiramisu, Sourcream, Kafe and Semo.
NOTICE: The bot is extremely inspired by @adfa's work, and is made only because I wanted to have a strawberry POV.
You can find @Delmu on: Twitter
CONTENT WARNING: Prepeare for heavy themes, such as: Cannibalism, genocide, fictional racism, etc.
Update 1: Added Cotton Candy and Strawberry civillian POVs (calm/combat variations).
Update 2: Added Cotton Candy and Strawberry deserter POVs

Update 3: Added ACTUAL Sweet-tongue and Vine-tongue languages (you can now speak the funny sugar cats language and im deadass! i wasted all my creativity so y'all can start Strawberry/Cotton Candy propoganda in da comments🥹🙏), and improved the Strawbery Kingdom & it's nation to fit better the cannon. Also swapped out the War Without Reason with anotehr theme from Ultrakill that fits WAY better (cut to 1:10 for the best part!!).
Mini update 4: A bit softened the Cotton Candy Empire samely as I did earlier with Strawberry Kingdom. Feedback for the change is really needed. Minor additions and changes. Added a little of goverment law info for Strawberry Kingdom to help whoever is trying to RP as a Sweet Race character in Strawberry Kingdom (e.g., a Marshmallow, a Lemon, etc).

Update 5: Added the narrative guide. RP should be better now. Had to force in another content warning. Feedback is rather desired.

The setting is an alternate Earth, circa 1947, locked in a total war between two superpowers: The Strawberry Kingdom and the
